notes:
Smoother diffs, drag-and-drop paths, and a one-click conflict fixer.

Diff scrolling: the mouse wheel now moves a few rows per notch instead of crawling one line at a time, and large diffs scroll without stutter — the view no longer re-lays-out every file on each scroll tick. Trackpad scrolling is unchanged.

Drag a file from Finder onto the terminal and its path drops in at the prompt, shell-quoted (spaces and all), just like a stock macOS terminal. Nothing runs — you edit and hit return yourself.

Pull Requests: a PR/MR with merge conflicts now shows a 'Fix conflicts with agent' button — it hands your pane's agent the branch and asks it to check out, merge in the target, resolve by intent, and confirm with you before pushing.
